name: Subjective & Team Sentiment
description: Individual team member sentiment consolidated anonymously. Each team member completes independently, then scores are averaged.

criteria.name: First Impression
criteria.description: What was the overall gut feeling discovering the project? (clarity, quality, excitement)

criteria.name: Enthusiasm Level
criteria.description: How excited is the team about this project? (positive energy, pride, engagement)

criteria.name: Concern & Frustration Level
criteria.description: How much concern/frustration exists? (Note: 5=minimal concern, 1=high frustration)

criteria.name: Overall Understanding
criteria.description: Does the team understand what the project is trying to accomplish?

criteria.name: Personal Vision Alignment
criteria.description: Do you personally agree with the project's direction and mission? (1-10 scale mapped to 1-5)

criteria.name: Ownership & Impact Feeling
criteria.description: Do you feel you can contribute meaningfully and see the impact of your work?

notes: Method: Each team member completes individually and anonymously. Tech lead consolidates responses without attribution. Global score is average of all individual scores across all team members.
anonymity: CONFIDENTIAL - All responses are consolidated anonymously. No individual statements are attributed.
